zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Clifton於1358年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓時，他的父親Robert de Clifton II26歲，母親Agnes de Grey24歲。他於1372年與Elizabeth Cromwell在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1403年7月21日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Clifton于1358年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓时，他的父亲Robert de Clifton II26岁，母亲Agnes de Grey24岁。他于1372年与Elizabeth Cromwell在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1403年7月21日在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Clifton was born in 1358, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Robert de Clifton II, was 26 and his mother, Agnes de Grey, was 24. He married Elizabeth Cromwell in 1372, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 21 July 1403, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Clifton est né en 1358, à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Clifton II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Grey, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cromwell en 1372, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1403, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Clifton 1358 in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Clifton II 26 und seine Mutter Agnes de Grey 24. Er hat 1372 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England Elizabeth Cromwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 21. Juli 1403 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Clifton è nato il nel 1358 nel Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Clifton II, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Grey, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Cromwell nel 1372, nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 21 luglio 1403, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cliftonが1358年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Clifton IIは26歳，母Agnes de Greyは24歳であった。1372年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルでElizabeth Cromwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1403年7月21日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Clifton(이)가 1358년 영국 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Clifton II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Grey(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1372년 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 Elizabeth Cromwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1403년 7월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Clifton nasceu em 1358, em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Clifton II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Grey, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Cromwell em 1372, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 21 de julho de 1403, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Clifton родился в 1358 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Clifton II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Grey, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cromwell в 1372 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 21 июля 1403 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Clifton nació en 1358, en Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Clifton II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes de Grey, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Cromwell en 1372, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 21 de julio de 1403, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
